chunks.text: Jacobs Institute for Design Innovation in the spotlight - EECS at Berkeley The Jacobs Institute for Design Innovation was spotlighted in an article in the California Council on Science & Technology (CCST) website titled “ UC Berkeley and UC San Diego Explore Engineering Education of the Future through Making ”. The Jacobs Institute is UC Berkeley’s interdisciplinary hub for students, teachers and practitioners who work at the intersection of design and technology to turn insights into prototypes and through testing and iteration design solutions that benefit people and society. Prof. Björn Hartmann is the interim faculty director. Categories Education Faculty View Open Faculty Positions
